# Smelloff

> Pocket-sized odor killer for your clothes — anytime, anywhere.

Smelloff is a D2C men's grooming brand from Hyderabad, India. Our first product is ODORSTRIKE — a 50ml pocket-sized fabric odor eliminator mist.

## Product: ODORSTRIKE

ODORSTRIKE is a fabric-only odor eliminator. Not a perfume, not a deodorant. It captures and neutralizes odor molecules trapped in fabric using Zinc Ricinoleate.

- Volume: 50ml
- Price: ₹159 (launch) / MRP ₹199
- Use: Fabric only (cotton, polyester, denim, wool)
- ~250 sprays per bottle
- Ships across India, COD available

## Links

- Instagram: https://instagram.com/smell0ff
